narrative:
Lyndhurst-02-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,242 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 31.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.5 percentage points.
